label.purpose: 10-11px pill badges and micro-labels for status indicators.

data.purpose: Timestamps, IDs, counts, code-like content — Geist Mono for instrument-panel precision.

shadows.name: ambient-card
shadows.purpose: The only shadow role in the system — a barely-there lift on light-mode dashboard cards, never a structural depth cue.

motion.name: state-transition
motion.purpose: Default transition for hover/focus/active state changes on buttons, nav items, and interactive rows.

motion.name: aurora-drift
motion.purpose: Slow ambient background drift animation used on select hero/marketing-adjacent surfaces (e.g. onboarding), not general UI.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Default action button — Signal Blue fill, Void Navy text, used for the primary action in any view.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; height: 32px; padding: 0 10px; background: oklch(0.75 0.18 215); color: oklch(0.09 0.02 264); font-family: Sora, ui-sans-serif, system-ui; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 0.6rem; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.75 0.18 215 / 80%); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: oklch(0.75 0.18 215); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.75 0.18 215 / 50%); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action button — hairline border, transparent fill, one-step tonal hover shift.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; height: 32px; padding: 0 10px; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.97 0.004 264); font-family: Sora, ui-sans-serif, system-ui; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid oklch(1 0 0 / 15%); border-radius: 0.6rem; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: oklch(1 0 0 / 6%); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: oklch(0.75 0.18 215); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.75 0.18 215 / 50%); }

components.name: Status Pill
components.description: Small rounded status badge — low-opacity hue tint plus a short text label, never color alone.
components.css: .ds-pill { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; font-family: Sora, ui-sans-serif, system-ui; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.01em; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 9999px; background: oklch(0.75 0.18 90 / 12%); color: oklch(0.75 0.18 90); border: 1px solid oklch(0.75 0.18 90 / 25%); }

components.name: Dashboard Card
components.description: Standard console panel card — flat in dark mode, tonal border, no shadow.
components.html:
Open tasks
14 items need review
components.css: .ds-card { background: oklch(0.12 0.018 264); border: 1px solid oklch(1 0 0 / 6%); border-radius: 1.05rem; padding: 16px; } .ds-card-title { font-family: Sora, ui-sans-serif, system-ui; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; color: oklch(0.97 0.004 264); margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-card-body { font-family: Sora, ui-sans-serif, system-ui; font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.58 0.02 264); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard text field — hairline border, translucent fill, matches button focus ring treatment.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; height: 32px; padding: 0 10px; background: oklch(1 0 0 / 4%); color: oklch(0.97 0.004 264); font-family: Sora, ui-sans-serif, system-ui; font-size: 0.875rem; border: 1px solid oklch(1 0 0 / 10%); border-radius: 0.6rem; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.58 0.02 264); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: oklch(0.75 0.18 215); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.75 0.18 215 / 50%); }

components.name: Data Value
components.description: Monospace data label for counts, timestamps, and IDs — the 'instrument panel' precision cue.
components.css: .ds-data { font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.58 0.02 264); letter-spacing: 0; }

narrative.overview: The Hub is a dark-first mission-control surface, not a bright SaaS dashboard. The default view is a deep navy void with a single glowing accent, Signal Blue, doing almost all of the attention-directing work. Everything else sits in muted navy tones so that when something needs a decision, it's the only thing that reads as "on." This is deliberate: the Hub sits above Zoho, Sanity, GitHub, and Supabase and exists to shorten the human decision loop, not to compete for visual attention with the systems of record underneath it. Light mode exists but the console is dark-first by convention. Depth comes from tonal layering, never heavy drop shadows or glassmorphism. This system explicitly rejects generic SaaS dashboard clichés in favor of something that reads as built specifically for how PMs and developers actually triage work here.
keyCharacteristics: Dark-first navy void with one glowing accent color, not a rainbow of equally-loud UI colors.
Flat, tonal depth — hairline borders and near-invisible shadows, no glassmorphism, no heavy elevation.
Precise, mono-tinged data (Geist Mono) paired with a warm geometric sans (Sora) for everything else.
Small, quiet pill badges (10-11px, rounded-full) carry status, not color-blocked banners.
Every themed surface pairs an explicit light/dark class via an isDark boolean prop — no dark: Tailwind variant.

rules.name: The One Glow Rule
rules.body: Signal Blue (or Deep Cobalt in light contexts) is the only color allowed to read as "lit up" on a screen. Status pills borrow hue at low opacity, but none of them compete with the primary accent for visual weight.

rules.name: The No-Shout Rule
rules.body: Nothing in the console uses uppercase-tracked eyebrow labels or oversized hero numbers to perform importance. Hierarchy comes from weight and size steps in the type scale, not decoration.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. If a shadow is being reached for to fix a hierarchy problem, that's a signal to fix spacing, border, or tonal contrast first — not add elevation.

dos: Do keep Signal Blue (dark) / Deep Cobalt (light) as the only "glowing" color on any given screen.
Do use the isDark boolean prop with paired explicit light/dark Tailwind classes for any new themed v2 component.
Do use Geist Mono for numbers, IDs, and timestamps; use Sora for everything else.
Do communicate status with hue + short text label together, never color alone.
Do keep shadows near-invisible — depth comes from tonal layering and hairline borders, not elevation.
donts: Don't ship generic SaaS dashboard clichés — no gradient hero-metric cards, no cookie-cutter icon-in-a-box grids.
Don't use border-left/border-right accent stripes on cards or list items as a status indicator.
Don't use gradient text for emphasis.
Don't introduce glassmorphism or backdrop-blur as decoration.
Don't use uppercase-tracked eyebrow labels above sections as default scaffolding.
Don't reach for a shadow to fix a hierarchy problem — fix spacing, border, or tonal contrast first.
